title: Colored Pots
description: Changes the patterns on the pots to colored ones!
body:
![colored pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ea0a9c5c6968398072c9614c490a7f2ff9e50f.png)

**This resource pack changes the boring monotonous patterns on pots to similar colored ones!**

|**With resource pack:**|**Without resource pack:**|
|----------------|-------------------------------|
|![with resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e157ff0b662fa567275a8912bb1d211c2391675.png)|![without resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00cfca7c37b206c8d17136b8230e96ef796cac79.png)          |
